risk_if_not_implemented: Without AI TEVV Benchmarking Content Provenance, AI and autonomous technology risks may go ungoverned, leading to unintended outcomes or exploitation.

compensating_control_1.name: Penetration Testing
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct penetration testing on Technology Assets, Applications and/or Services (TAAS).
compensating_control_1.justification: Penetration Testing (VPM-07) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of AI TEVV Benchmarking Content Provenance (AAT-10.17) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to regularly review processes and documented procedures to ensure conformity with the organization's security, compliance and/or resilience policies, standards and other applicable requirements.
compensating_control_2.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments (CPL-03) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of AI TEVV Benchmarking Content Provenance (AAT-10.17) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
